name: Pecan Cookies (Polvorones)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, beat together the sugar, butter, and lard on high speed until light and fluffy, about 3 minutes.
3. Add the egg yolk and vanilla; beat until smooth.
4. Beat in the flour, cinnamon, anise seed, and salt until well combined.
5. Stir in the chopped pecans.
6. Roll walnut-sized pieces of dough between palms to form round balls.
7. Place the remaining 1/4 cup sugar in a pie plate.
8. Roll each dough ball in the sugar, coating it lightly.
9. Place the coated balls about 5 inches apart on an ungreased baking sheet.
10. Press each ball with the flat bottom of a glass dipped in sugar until the dough is about 1/4-inch thick.
11. Bake for 10 minutes.
12. Reduce the oven temperature to 300°F and continue baking until lightly browned, about 12 to 15 minutes.
13. Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack.
